description: Bug Hunt armor types - Compendium p.178

armor.name: Trooper Armor
armor.description: Standard military-issue armor. Saving throw on 5-6.

armor.name: Combat Armor
armor.description: Heavier protective gear. Saving throw on 4-6.

armor.name: Scout Suit
armor.description: Lightweight protection for mobile operatives. Saving throw on 6 only.
